title: Osteoporosis rheumatology review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

treatment_and_management.text: Supports detailed risk history, fragility-fracture context, falls risk, FRAX and BMD context, and monitoring of treatment effects.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports fracture-risk assessment for osteoporosis review; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports detailed risk history, fragility-fracture context, falls risk, FRAX and BMD context, and monitoring of treatment effects.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

medication.text: Supports documenting falls, low calcium or vitamin D context, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine context, personal or family fracture history, and secondary causes.
medication.rationale: Supports osteoporosis risk-factor review for osteoporosis review; no decision is generated.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports documenting falls, low calcium or vitamin D context, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine context, personal or family fracture history, and secondary causes.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

follow_up.text: Supports clinician-reviewed DEXA reporting with age and risk qualifiers and without independently assigning a diagnosis.
follow_up.rationale: Supports bone-mineral-density assessment for osteoporosis review; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-reviewed DEXA reporting with age and risk qualifiers and without independently assigning a diagnosis.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Diagnosis, fractures, DEXA values and dates, risk calculation, falls, medicines, secondary causes, laboratory results, treatment, adherence and plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for osteoporosis review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
